pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh candidates list and checked by verifier.py
Found in export_result.sh as the exact export_dir path where files are checked
Found in verifier.py where it asserts size_bytes >= 10240

privileged_info_summary: The task validates the export of a DICOM series as a video. The verifier checks that the exported video is named either anatomy_scroll.avi or anatomy_scroll.mp4 and placed in /home/ga/DICOM/exports. The output file must be at least 10240 bytes in size and have valid AVI or MP4 magic bytes in its header.
